query: hormonal therapy radiation combined endometrial cancer brachytherapy

results.title: Endometriosis: Etiology, pathobiology, and therapeutic prospects.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 34048704. 2021/05/27 00:00. BACKGROUND: The beneficial effects of hormonal therapy in stimulating 
spermatogenesis in patients with non-obstructive azoospermia (NOA) and either 
normal gonadotrophins or hypergonadotropic hypogonadism prior to surgical sperm 
retrieval (SSR) is controversial. Although the European Association of Urology 
guidelines state that hormone stimulation is not recommended in routine clinical 
practice, a significant number of patients undergo empiric therapy p
